summary: Tested Bulk CSV Farmer Onboarding feature end-to-end. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 15 features verified as working correctly via Playwright + screenshots.

ui_bugs.issue: Disclaimer footer text still says 'program rules' instead of 'project rules'. Unresolved from previous iteration.

design_issues.screen: Bulk Upload Modal - Validation table (All tab selected)
issues: Trailing newline in CSV creates an extra empty row (e.g., row 6 with 'missing' name and phone). Not a blocking bug - CSV parser correctly flags it as 3 errors. Users may be slightly confused seeing 5 rows when they uploaded 4 rows. Minor edge case.

action_items: MINOR: Consider trimming completely empty trailing rows from CSV before validation to avoid confusing users
LOW (from iter-2): FarmersPage.js disclaimer - change 'program rules' to 'project rules'
critical_code_review_comments: Backend bulk_validate_csv does a batch DB phone check ONLY for rows that pass local validation (no local errors). This means a row with an invalid phone number that later gets fixed could bypass the DB dup check. However this is mitigated by re-validation in bulk_onboard. Logic is correct and safe.
Trailing newline from CSV is parsed as an empty data row (row 6 with missing fields). The backend correctly flags it with errors, but UX could strip leading/trailing empty rows for cleaner output.
seed_data_creation: Test bulk upload farmers created during testing: TEST_UIFinal_Valid1 (9700200001), TEST_UIFinal_Valid2 (9700200002), TEST_UIFarmer_Valid1 (9600100001), TEST_UIFarmer_Valid2 (9600100002), and multiple others from backend tests. Farmer count grew from 65 (seed) to ~74 during testing. All TEST_ prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk CSV Farmer Onboarding feature is COMPLETE and working. All 26 backend tests pass. Full UI flow verified: modal opens → project select → CSV upload → validate (mixed rows correctly split) → filter tabs work → confirm onboard → success summary → farmers page refreshes with new count. Backend endpoint /api/farmers/bulk/validate-csv correctly catches: missing name, bad phone, invalid land_type, negative acres, intra-CSV duplicate phones, phone-already-in-DB. Onboard endpoint correctly inserts valid rows and re-validates for safety. Previous iteration-2 bugs (Add Farmer phone validation, Claims→Activities label, subtitle count, etc.) were NOT retested in this iteration - those are separate concerns.

features_tested.5_validate_disabled_until_both: PASS - Button disabled without project; disabled without file; enabled only when both selected

features_tested.7_validation_results_step2: PASS - Summary banner shows 2 valid/3 errors/5 total/project name; per-row table shows green Valid and red error messages
features_tested.8_filter_tabs: PASS - All/Valid/Errors tabs correctly filter rows
features_tested.9_download_error_report: PASS - Button visible when errors exist (frontend download button rendered)
features_tested.10_confirm_onboard_button: PASS - Shows '(2 farmers)' count; clickable when valid_count > 0
features_tested.11_after_onboard_success: PASS - 'All farmers onboarded!' banner, count=2, project name shown; farmers page shows 74 (was 72, +2 new)
features_tested.12_backend_validate_csv: PASS - Returns total_rows, valid_count, error_count, project_id, project_name, rows[] with per-row errors
features_tested.13_backend_onboard: PASS - Inserts valid farmers, returns success_count, error_count, successes[], errors[], project_name
